name: Seraphimon

signature_move.name: Seven Heavens
signature_move.description: Fires seven super-heated spheres of light at the opponent.

description: A Seraph Digimon that is dressed in holy armor that shines silver, and possesses ten golden wings. As the highest-ranked being among Angel Digimon, it rules over them all. Although its true face and personality is hidden behind a mask and cannot be glimpsed, it is the being closest to the "Being of Good" called " God ". It is told that when it descends for the final battle against evil beings, it will purify everything. Also, it is said that Demon , who fell to the Dark Area and became a Demon Lord Digimon, was originally a Seraphimon. Its Special Moves are firing seven super-heated spheres of light at the opponent ( Seven Heavens ), and its greatest special technique, which sacrifices its mortal life to trigger a Big Bang ( Testament ).
